- Bundle Benefits:

Details:
Main Bundle un-used units will carry over to the next month in case of early or on-time renewal.
Carried over units should be consumed after current main bundle’s units
Missed call notification is provided to all customers within bundle
Bundle validity = 28 days.
- 25% extra on Nitro bundles
Customer will get 25% extra on Nitro bundles upon subscribing to Nitro bundles when having active Super Kix and Nitro bundles.
Customer should be active Super Kix when subscribing or renewing Nitro to be granted the extra quota on Nitro.

Terms and Conditions:
Minutes to any WE number or landline = 1 minute from bundle.
Minute to other networks = 5 minutes from bundle.
SMS to all networks = 1 SMS from bundle.
1 MB on all internet platforms = 1 MB from your bundle
Renewal will be done automatically if there is enough balance.
Unused minutes and megabytes from the main bundle will be carried over for the following month in case of on time renewal.
In case of non-renewal or after consuming the bundle, the customer will be charged for 19 PT per minute and SMS for all networks and landline or MBs.
All existing customers can transfer to any of WE Club bundles at any time through visiting any of WE stores.

Missed Call Keeper
You can receive an SMS notification of all numbers tried to reach to you when your phone was unavailable, to subscribe; dial *066#.
Read more
Bill Limit
You can control your bills limit by previously setting your bill at a certain amount over your monthly fees plan. To subscribe; dial *883#
Balance Query
You can receive an SMS notification about the current units in your package. Dial #550*
to subscribe to the service
Bundle Query
You can receive an SMS notification about the current units in your package. Dial *414# to subscribe to the service
Call Filter
Create Black/White lists
Notification On Reachability
You can be notified via an SMS with unreachable numbers you tried to contact, the moment they are available again. To subscribe, dial *066#
Voice Mail
Enjoy your voice mail as an answering machine whenever you are unreachable. To subscribe; dial *505#
SMS Alert
Subscribe to a variety of large range topics by SMS Alert, dial *2525#
Data Transfer
Now Nitro customers can transfer megabytes to other WE customers by dialing *552#
VoLTE Technology
With VoLTE technology, enjoy HD voice & fast internet simultaneously with calls

1 كيكس = 1 ميجا استهلاك على جميع المواقع و التطبيقات
1 كيكس= 1 رسالة لشبكة .WE
5 كيكس= 1 رسالة لكل للشبكات.

After 100% consumption, you will be charged as out of bundle according to your main bundle.
